name: neo-hexo-monorepo
description: Neo-Hexo: A modern static site generator, reimagined.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/fs packages/utils packages/database packages/front-matter packages/i18n packages/renderer-markdown packages/processor packages/generator packages/filter packages/helper packages/highlight packages/injector packages/renderer-edge packages/console packages/deployer-git packages/cli packages/theme packages/neo-hexo
scripts.clean: tsc -b packages/core packages/fs packages/utils packages/database packages/front-matter packages/i18n packages/renderer-markdown packages/processor packages/generator packages/filter packages/helper packages/highlight packages/injector packages/renderer-edge packages/console packages/deployer-git packages/cli packages/theme packages/neo-hexo --clean
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/fs packages/utils packages/database packages/front-matter packages/i18n packages/renderer-markdown packages/processor packages/generator packages/filter packages/helper packages/highlight packages/injector packages/renderer-edge packages/console packages/deployer-git packages/cli packages/theme packages/neo-hexo --noEmit

author: Tommy Chen <tommy351@gmail.com> (https://zespia.tw)
